references.hebrew: בֶּן־אָדָ֕ם אֱמׇר־לָ֕הּ אַ֣תְּ אֶ֔רֶץ לֹ֥א מְטֹהָרָ֖ה הִ֑יא לֹ֥א גֻשְׁמָ֖הּ בְּי֥וֹם זָֽעַם׃
references.english: O mortal, say to her: You are an unpurified land, not to be washed with rainhnot to be washed with rain Meaning of Heb. uncertain. on the day of indignation.
The word of G<small>OD</small> came to me:

references.hebrew: וּנְתַתֶּ֣ם אֹתָ֔הּ אֶל־אֶלְעָזָ֖ר הַכֹּהֵ֑ן וְהוֹצִ֤יא אֹתָהּ֙ אֶל־מִח֣וּץ לַֽמַּחֲנֶ֔ה וְשָׁחַ֥ט אֹתָ֖הּ לְפָנָֽיו׃
references.english: You shall give it to Eleazar the priest. It shall be taken outside the camp and slaughtered in his presence.

references.hebrew: וְשָׂרַ֥ף אֶת־הַפָּרָ֖ה לְעֵינָ֑יו אֶת־עֹרָ֤הּ וְאֶת־בְּשָׂרָהּ֙ וְאֶת־דָּמָ֔הּ עַל־פִּרְשָׁ֖הּ יִשְׂרֹֽף׃
references.english: The cow shall be burned in his sight—its hide, flesh, and blood shall be burned, its dung included—
